description_long: This object is a stylized shotgun with a blocky, voxel-like design, featuring a long, cylindrical black barrel and a contrasting orange stock. The stock is open-framed and rectangular, with a solid buttplate at the end, providing a modern, tactical appearance. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact and black, with a visible trigger guard and a small, squared trigger. The fore-end is integrated into the barrel, lacking any visible pump or lever mechanism. The overall construction suggests a semi-automatic or single-shot configuration, with no external magazine or shell port visible. The color palette is limited to matte black and orange, giving it a distinctive, high-contrast look suitable for urban environments.
description: A blocky, modern shotgun with a long black barrel and an open orange stock, featuring a compact receiver and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black barrel and the open orange stock, with the trigger and receiver clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the orange stock barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the same features from the other side, including the orange stock and black barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the orange stock and the linear alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, blocky shape and no finger grooves
